snippets.title: 列出数据库
snippets.sql: SELECT datname FROM pg_database ORDER BY datname;

snippets.title: 列出所有表
snippets.sql:
SELECT table_schema, table_name
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
ORDER BY table_schema, table_name;

snippets.title: 用户列表（最近50）
snippets.sql:
SELECT id, name, username, email, is_admin, created_at
FROM public.legacy_users
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

snippets.title: 用户总数
snippets.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_users FROM public.legacy_users;

snippets.title: 按邮箱查用户
按用户名查用户
设为管理员
snippets.sql: UPDATE public.legacy_users SET is_admin = TRUE WHERE email = 'someone@example.com';

snippets.title: 取消管理员
snippets.sql: UPDATE public.legacy_users SET is_admin = FALSE WHERE email = 'someone@example.com';

snippets.title: 最近注册用户（20）
snippets.sql:
SELECT id, name, username, email, created_at
FROM public.legacy_users
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

snippets.title: 重置用户密码（哈希）
查看验证码表（如存在）
snippets.sql:
SELECT *
FROM public.verification_codes
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

snippets.title: 当前连接数与上限
当前活动连接
snippets.sql:
SELECT pid, usename, datname, client_addr, state, query_start, LEFT(query, 200) AS query
FROM pg_stat_activity
WHERE state <> 'idle'
ORDER BY query_start DESC;

snippets.title: 慢查询（超过5秒）
snippets.sql:
SELECT pid, now() - query_start AS duration, state, LEFT(query, 300) AS query
FROM pg_stat_activity
WHERE state = 'active' AND now() - query_start > interval '5 seconds'
ORDER BY duration DESC;

snippets.title: 锁等待
snippets.sql:
SELECT blocked.pid AS blocked_pid,
       blocked.query AS blocked_query,
       blocking.pid AS blocking_pid,
       blocking.query AS blocking_query
FROM pg_locks blocked_locks
JOIN pg_stat_activity blocked ON blocked.pid = blocked_locks.pid
JOIN pg_locks blocking_locks ON blocking_locks.locktype = blocked_locks.locktype
  AND blocking_locks.database IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.database
  AND blocking_locks.relation IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.relation
  AND blocking_locks.page IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.page
  AND blocking_locks.tuple IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.tuple
  AND blocking_locks.virtualxid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.virtualxid
  AND blocking_locks.transactionid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.transactionid
  AND blocking_locks.classid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.classid
  AND blocking_locks.objid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.objid
  AND blocking_locks.objsubid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.objsubid
JOIN pg_stat_activity blocking ON blocking.pid = blocking_locks.pid
WHERE NOT blocked_locks.granted;

snippets.title: 表大小排行（Top 20）
snippets.sql:
SELECT schemaname, relname, pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(relid)) AS total_size
FROM pg_catalog.pg_statio_user_tables
ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(relid) DESC
LIMIT 20;
